name: Creole Seafood Gumbo
recipeIngredient: Shrimp (2 cups), crabmeat, and oyster meat (combined)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan.
2. Gradually blend flour into the melted butter, stirring constantly over low heat until it turns dark brown.
3. Add liquid, okra, tomatoes, onion, green bell pepper, Tabasco sauce, thyme, and bay leaf to the pan.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Add the seafood (shrimp, crabmeat, and oyster meat) and cook, covered, for an additional 10 to 15 minutes until fully heated through.
6. Remove the bay leaf before serving the soup in bowls, with a mound of hot cooked rice placed in the center.
